meeting.track_notes: Turf. Summer course 2800m in circumference with 600m run-in. Winter course 2700m with 450m run-in. Races up to 1200m testing straight course (1200m races are occasionally run round the turn, starting on the Summer course and ending on the Winter course); beyond 1200m anti-clockwise round turn. DRAW: Low-numbers draws slightly preferred all races. Wet going can impact on draw in 1200m 1400 W m
meeting.draw_bias_notes: DRAW: Low-numbers draws slightly preferred all races. Wet going can impact on draw in 1200m 1400 W m

races.race_name: Hollywoodbets KENILWORTH WELCOMES YOU MAIDEN JUVENILE PLATE (Fillies)
races.tab_bet_types: WIN - PLACE - SWINGER - EXACTA - TRIFECTA - QUARTET
races.preview: An interesting first race where a number of newcomers could prove dangerous. CRACK OF DAWN makes her debut representing trainer Andre Nel. She is a Malmoos filly that could score on debut. JEWEL MULE made a fair debut and that experience could be made use of over this course and distance. SUMMER LAKE is a Querari filly and would not be a surprise winner. CAPE TOWN DEERN and LEONISTA are two other newcomers worth considering. Watch the betting.

races.race_name: LUCKY FISH CHILLI HEAT MAIDEN JUVENILE PLATE
races.tab_bet_types: WIN - PLACE - SWINGER - EXACTA - TRIFECTA - QUARTET
races.preview: A tricky race as the draw could play a role. ANOTHER HERO is improving and could go one better this time. BLACKBIRD and SARATOGA SUNRISE have not been disgraced so far and are likely to improve so must be respected. There are many newcomers that could be good enough to score. DISCO JET is a Rafeef colt. SOSSUSVLEI is a son of Erik The Red. GENTIAN represents Vercingetorix. WAITING GAME cost R2.2 million so most eyes will be on him. GUNNER GALACTICO is a Malmoos colt.

races.race_name: BET WITH TOTE www.tote.co.za B STAKES
races.tab_bet_types: WIN - PLACE - SWINGER - EXACTA - TRIFECTA - QUARTET
races.preview: Snaith Racing have four of the seven runners carded. MENTE ET MANU probably needed his last run and should do a lot better this time with Richard Fourie in the irons. SCOTTISH KISS was supported when unplaced at Fairview. He probably did not show his best on the Polytrack that day and could be a big runner. POMP IT UP seems better than his last run. BOMBERS IN THE SKY returns from a break and is likely to need the run. MIAMI SUMMER showed promise last year but is returning from a break. HANDSOME PRINCE should be competitive once again.

races.tab_bet_types: WIN - PLACE - SWINGER - EXACTA - TRIFECTA - QUARTET
races.preview: A competitive race. Candice Bass has three of the seven runners. PEACHES AND CREAM has Aldo Domeyer in the saddle and she has improved with blinkers. This distance suits her and she could score. Stable companion FINAL CALL is better than her last run suggests and could get the run of the race. LA PATRONA was not disgraced from a wide draw last time and could be more of a danger this time. ELUSIVE GIFT is not reliable but can earn. PUSHING LIMITS and MISS ATTITUDE are both in good form and are clearly not out of it.

races.race_name: KIKKULI STANDING AT PAARDEBERG STUD CLASS 4
races.tab_bet_types: WIN - PLACE - SWINGER - EXACTA - TRIFECTA - QUARTET
races.preview: CORK BAY clearly likes a soft track and was an impressive winner last time out. He could get those conditions again so may well follow up. KELP FOREST is not reliable but from a good draw he should be competitive. YAMAZAKI returns from a break but could make the frame. WEHAVEASITUATION will strip fitter off his last run and can surprise. WORLDLY and BLACK CHEETAH are both capable of contesting the finish.

races.race_type: For All Horses (Non-Black Type)) No Allowances
races.tab_bet_types: WIN - PLACE - SWINGER - EXACTA - TRIFECTA - QUARTET

races.race_type: For All Horses (Non-Black Type)) No Allowances
races.tab_bet_types: WIN - PLACE - SWINGER - EXACTA - TRIFECTA - QUARTET
races.preview: A very open looking race. It is advisable to go very wide in this leg of the Pick 6. GALLIC DREAM struggled last time out from a poor draw. He should do a lot better this time. Trainer Justin Snaith has a decent hand. MAGIC VERSE is in good shape but does give weight to most rivals. SUGAR MOUNTAIN had some solid wins last year around this time and could be a threat but will be giving all his rivals weight. IN A TIMELY MANNER needed his last run and could strike. PLEASE BE TRUE only found one better last time and is clearly not out of it. MAJOR MASTER and CHASINGTHERAINBOW both arrive for this in good shape and must be included in all bets.

races.tab_bet_types: WIN - PLACE - SWINGER - EXACTA - TRIFECTA - QUARTET
races.preview: SUPER VIKING has taken well to his gelding operation and looks the right one for this. It is competitive, though. LANDSEER is unreliable but could earn. BOURBON KING has improved with blinkers and would not be a surprise winner. SMART HORSE has a place chance. WALOYO YAMONI needed his last run and could make the frame. BATON ROUGE and BALZI ROSSI are both in good shape and are possible winners.
